app.name: Luna
app.tagline: for you, in tune with your cycle

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Language, privacy, account and more.
settings.language_desc: The app updates instantly to the selected language.
settings.privacy_body: Your data belongs to you. We only store cycle, mood and tracking data in your account (or locally in guest mode). We never sell data and never use it for ads. You can delete your profile at any time.
settings.sign_out_desc: You will be signed out of your account.
settings.delete_profile_desc: Permanently deletes your account and all stored data.
settings.delete_confirm_body: This cannot be undone. All logs, to-dos, appointments and settings will be removed for good.
settings.guest_delete_desc: In guest mode this deletes all locally stored data.
settings.payments_body: Luna's basic version stays free. Premium features (AI daily forecasts, advanced insights) are coming soon.
settings.rate_body: If Luna helps you, a short review means the world to us 💜
